text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Today is the day of the Fan Fest, a school event
where the campus opens to the general public
and various events are held. It's a day filled with
joy, but for Rice Shower...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Urgh... Of all things, why did it have to be the
marathon?!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
You'll be okay! You'll get through the race super
easy! Like ZOOOOM!

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
Exactly. As a stayer, there's no doubt you'll be
able to finish the race!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: N-no, that's not what I...

text_block_list.name: Spectator A
text_block_list.text: Whoa, she really is here! McQueen!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Naturally. It would be improper not to participate
in campus events.

text_block_list.name: Spectator A
text_block_list.text:
Squeee! So cool! That's the star stayer "Best
Actress" for ya!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: N-now hold on! Who's been calling me that?!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
My, my. That's the assumed three-time spring
Tenno Sho champion for ya!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Ohhh, not you too, Teio!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Sigh... This is a competition. A long-distance race, at that.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: ...Please let me focus.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Hahaha, all right then. I'll just sit back and watch.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: ...Why is this happening?!

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Is this not a favorable opportunity? The current
lineup has made this a perfect simulation of the
spring Tenno Sho.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: B-Bourbon? But aren't you inju—

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
I have already executed the rehabilitation
program. After running a quick system evaluation,
I have judged myself capable of observing today.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Rice. You said that you would beat McQueen at
the spring Tenno Sho.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: I am looking forward to measuring your growth.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: ...Right.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Time is limited. Only two minutes remain until the
race commences. Preparations must be completed
quickly.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: I-it's about to start?! Good... goodbye!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
...Oh! And please do watch me, Bourbon. I want
you to see how much I've improved.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: And so, Rice Shower's marathon event begins.

text_block_list.name: Event Commentator
text_block_list.text:
The racers approach the last slope! Who will be
the first to cross the finish line?!

text_block_list.name: Event Commentator
text_block_list.text:
McQueen! It's McQueen! McQueen has secured
an incredible first place!

text_block_list.name: Event Commentator
text_block_list.text:
As for the other big contender, Rice Shower... she
finishes in eighth place?! That's quite a ways back.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Pant... pant... No... it can't be!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: I couldn't keep up at all! At this rate, I—

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: Riiice! Good job out there!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Huff... wheeze... Huh? Where's Rice?

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
Hm... I could have sworn she was over here a
second ago...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: I need to work harder.

text_block_list.name: Event Commentator
text_block_list.text:
As for the other big contender, Rice Shower... she
finishes in a close second!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Pant... pant...

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: Good job, Rice!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Second place, can you believe it?! We've GOT to
celebrate!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Th-thanks... but...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: I've still got a long way to go...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: S-sorry, but... I don't want to celebrate yet.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Next time I won't let anyone down!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: W-wait. Rice!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: I need to work harder.
